caption: A man wearing a green t-shirt and a matching green baseball cap speaks into a professional black microphone while wearing over-ear headphones. His shirt features white stylized text that reads "ION NEVER DO SHUT AT WRK". He is situated in a room decorated with framed photos on the wall and clothing racks in the background, including a white t-shirt displayed on a mannequin. Small logos are visible in the bottom corners of the scene, including one that reads "BOSSY FLY DOT COM". Throughout the sequence, the man is actively talking and gesturing with his right hand, which moves from his side to an open, raised position. The camera angle remains a steady medium close-up, focusing on his expressions and upper body as he speaks.
